message:
fix: Q6_K dequantization to match llama.cpp reference

Previous implementation had incorrect indexing that didn't match
llama.cpp's dequantize_row_q6_K. Fixed to:
- Process two 128-element halves per 256-element block
- Use interleaved ql/qh layout correctly
- Apply scales with correct sc[is + 0/2/4/6] pattern

This improves Paris token logit from -3.08 to +3.30.
